raw_title: Unmasking the Mechanism: How News Media Consumption Drives Conspiracy Beliefs
title_en: Unmasking the Mechanism: How News Media Consumption Drives Conspiracy Beliefs
title_zh: 揭示机制：新闻媒体消费如何驱动阴谋论信念
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们如何通过消费新闻媒体来形成或加强阴谋论信念。它试图揭示媒体内容如何影响人们对阴谋论的看法，特别是在数字新闻环境中。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how people develop or strengthen conspiracy beliefs through news media consumption. It aims to uncover how media content influences perceptions of conspiracy theories, particularly in digital journalism contexts.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注媒体消费与阴谋论信念之间的因果关系，属于媒体效果和数字新闻学领域，旨在理解信息环境如何塑造公众认知。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on the causal relationship between media consumption and conspiracy beliefs, within the fields of media effects and digital journalism, aiming to understand how information environments shape public perceptions.
